title: Education (Application for Licence of Religious Schools) Regulations, 2002
title_en: Education (Application for Licence of Religious Schools) Regulations, 2002

provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content: These regulations may be cited as the Education (Application for Licence of Religious Schools) Regulations.

provisions.title: Interpretation
provisions.content: In these Regulations, unless the context otherwise requires– " religious school " means any assembly, institution, organization or place in respect of which the Minister is satisfied that its sole or main purpose is to provide religious instructions or which is maintained by a religious organization for the purpose of training for the ordained Ministry or for admission to a religious order.

provisions.title: Application
provisions.content: Every application for a licence and registration of a religious school shall be made in the prescribed Form No. RS. 9 set out in the Schedule hereto and shall be submitted to the Zonal Chief Inspector of Schools who shall subsequently submit the same to the Minister for approval.

provisions.title: Revocation
provisions.content: [Revokes the Education (Application for Licence of Religious Schools) Regulations 1 .] 1 G.N. No. 440 of 2000 Schedule Form no. definitions.definition: any assembly, institution, organization or place in respect of which the Minister is satisfied that its sole or main purpose is to provide religious instructions or which is maintained by a religious organization for the purpose of training for the ordained Ministry or for admission to a religious order.
